summary: Revision 2 of subtask 004 successfully migrated the QiYuan Web editing skill from standalone file format (skill_qyweb_editing.md) to folder-based format (qyweb_editing/SKILL.md) with YAML frontmatter. All 4 copies are byte-identical (SHA256: 15fccfc9...). Old standalone files confirmed removed from all 3 external locations. SKILL.md has correct YAML frontmatter (name: qyweb-editing, description: ...), 418 lines of comprehensive content covering all 5 collections, and follows the same folder structure as the reference paper_writing skill. No site files were modified. All subtasks 001-004 are now complete — the project is DONE.

Content completeness: 10 step-by-step procedures (5 collection create + update existing + static pages + navigation + pre-commit validation + site overview)

git status --short returns empty — no site files modified
File is 418 lines — substantive content, not shallow
